title: SkillsFuture Work-Study Post-Diploma
text:
SkillsFuture Work-Study Post-Diploma - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Work-Study Post-Diploma
Share link
Provides a $5,000 sign-on incentive and industry-recognised qualifications for eligible fresh Polytechnic graduates.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive a sign-on incentive of $5,000 for eligible fresh Polytechnic graduates
Competitive starting salary and full-time employment with participating companies
Attain an industry-recognised Post-Diploma qualification or professional certification
Collapse all sections
About this support

Competitive starting salary with full-time employment at participating companies

Attain an industry-recognised Post-Diploma qualification or professional certification

$5,000 sign-on incentive for eligible fresh Polytechnic graduates

Potential for skills-based wage increments and career advancement upon programme completion

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents

Fresh Polytechnic graduates within 3 years of graduation

Full-time National Servicemen within 3 years of Operationally Ready Date

How to apply?

Submit your application through the respective polytechnic's website:

Ngee Ann Polytechnic

Nanyang Polytechnic

Republic Polytechnic

Singapore Polytechnic

Temasek Polytechnic

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline:6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours:
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore

1 Paya Lebar Link,

#08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2,

Singapore 408533



Scheme last updated 06 Nov 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
